final_choice.row_label: Salaries, wages and social security costs

variables.notes: CR:c|high|missing. R:c. No explicit SG&A row exists. More natural overhead components ('Salaries, wages and social security costs' and 'Other operating expenses') are duplicated with identical row labels appearing twice, so choosing them by label alone is ambiguous for extraction. Used non-duplicated overhead buckets instead, but manual review is needed to determine whether duplicated personnel/other operating expense rows should replace or supplement these selections.
